channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 → 2026-12-13 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo's tour is highly anticipated, and her strong live reputation makes this a must-see event.

item.title: Gracie Abrams @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-07 04:00 → 2026-12-08 04:00 — Gracie Abrams at Oakland Arena. Gracie Abrams is gaining significant buzz with her heartfelt pop sound, making her tour a compelling choice.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center. Teddy Swims is known for his powerful vocals and emotional performances, promising an engaging live experience.

item.title: Journey @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-29 03:30 — Journey at Chase Center. Journey's legacy and nostalgia factor attract a dedicated fanbase, making this a notable event.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. KATSEYE's unique sound and energetic performances are gaining traction, making this tour intriguing.

item.title: John Summit @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-05 03:00 — John Summit at Oakland Arena. John Summit is a rising star in the electronic scene, and his CTRL ESCAPE tour is expected to be a highlight.

item.title: Brand New @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-11-12 04:00 — Brand New at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Brand New's return to the stage is highly anticipated, appealing to fans of alternative rock.

item.title: Nothing But Thieves @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2027-04-04 03:00 — Nothing But Thieves at Fox Theater - Oakland. Nothing But Thieves is known for their dynamic live shows, making this tour a noteworthy event.

item.title: The Mountain Goats @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-11-16 04:00 → 2026-11-22 04:00 — The Mountain Goats at The Fillmore. The Mountain Goats' unique storytelling and engaging performances make their shows a must-see.

item.title: Eloise @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-12-03 04:00 — Eloise at The Fillmore. Eloise's rising popularity and engaging performances make her show at The Fillmore noteworthy.

item.title: Strawberry Guy @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-12-11 04:00 — Strawberry Guy at The Fillmore. Strawberry Guy's unique sound and growing fanbase make this show an exciting option.

item.title: Bonobo @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-11-15 04:00 — Bonobo at Fox Theater - Oakland. Bonobo's live performances are known for their immersive experience, making this tour a highlight.

item.title: Pretty Lights @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-11-20 03:30 — Pretty Lights at Fox Theater - Oakland. Pretty Lights' return to the stage is highly anticipated, promising a memorable live experience.
